name: com.directinput.unity
description: A native Direct Input plugin to expose DirectX Input & ForceFeedback for Unity

samples.description: Use this demo to understand how to use the Direct Input API for DirectInput and ForceFeedback Devices using its IMGUI-based UI covering all the features.
(Don't import both Examples at once!) Another example demo to learn and actually use this in your projects using a simple key-binding UGUI menu with understanding the key points!

samples.displayName: NWH Vehicle Physics 2 v13 FFB Sample Demo
samples.description: (Needs one of the above example demo assets) Uncover how to utilize this Direct Input API for DInput and ForceFeedback Devices for NWH Vehicle Physics 2 v13, You need to import the vehicle physics assets first!
